innateAbility.name: Greevil's Greed
innateAbility.description: Synthesizes additional gold from killed enemy units.Alchemist earns base bonus gold and extra bonus gold per last hit. If Alchemist kills another unit which grants gold within a short duration, an additional instance of bonus gold is added to the total.

abilities.name: Acid Spray
abilities.description: Enemy units who step across the contaminated terrain take damage per second and have their armor reduced.

abilities.name: Unstable Concoction
abilities.description: Brews up an unstable concoction that the Alchemist can throw at an enemy hero, to stun and deal damage within the radius around the explosion.The longer the brew, the more the damage and the longer the stun. While brewing, Alchemist moves faster.The brew reaches its max power after a period of time, and explodes himself if not thrown before the max brew time.

abilities.name: Unstable Concoction Throw
abilities.description: The longer the concoction brews, the more the potent.Throw it before it blows up!

abilities.name: Corrosive Weaponry
abilities.description: Each successful attack applies a stacking slow and base attack damage reduction.

abilities.name: Berserk Potion
abilities.description: Throws a potion at an allied unit, applying a basic dispel and granting them bonus attack speed, movement speed and health regeneration.

abilities.name: Chemical Rage
abilities.description: Reduces the ogre's base attack time while granting bonus movement speed and health regeneration.

talents.left: +3 Attack Damage Bonus per Greevil's Greed Stack

talents.right: +1% Corrosive Weaponry Move Speed Slow/Base Damage Reduction per Stack
